Bash(node -e "const j=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''C:/Users/zohnw/AppData/Local/Temp/espn_stats.json'',''utf8''\)\); const cats = j.categories; console.log\(''num categories:'', cats.length\); if\(cats[0]\) { console.log\(''cat[0] keys:'', Object.keys\(cats[0]\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''cat[0] name:'', cats[0].name\); console.log\(''cat[0] names:'', cats[0].names?.slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\(''cat[0] totals:'', cats[0].totals?.slice\(0,10\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const j=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''C:/Users/zohnw/AppData/Local/Temp/nba_leaders.json'',''utf8''\)\); const rs = j.resultSet; console.log\(''headers:'', rs.headers.join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''count:'', rs.rowSet.length\); // Show a few players console.log\(''top 3:''\); rs.rowSet.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(r => { const o = {}; rs.headers.forEach\(\(h,i\) => o[h]=r[i]\); console.log\(o.PLAYER, o.PTS, o.REB, o.AST, o.FG_PCT\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\(''C:/Users/zohnw/AppData/Local/Temp/nba_leaders.json''\); const rs=j.resultSet; const h=rs.headers; rs.rowSet.slice\(0,2\).forEach\(row=>{ const get=k=>row[h.indexOf\(k\)]; console.log\(get\(''PLAYER''\), ''FG%:'', get\(''FG_PCT''\), ''3P%:'', get\(''FG3_PCT''\), ''FT%:'', get\(''FT_PCT''\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const t=require\(''C:/Users/zohnw/AppData/Local/Temp/mlb_teams.json''\); const s=require\(''C:/Users/zohnw/AppData/Local/Temp/mlb_sched.json''\); const h=require\(''C:/Users/zohnw/AppData/Local/Temp/mlb_hitting.json''\); console.log\(''teams:'', t.teams?.length\); console.log\(''schedule dates:'', s.dates?.length, ''totalGames:'', s.totalGames\); console.log\(''hitting stats keys:'', Object.keys\(h\)\); if\(h.stats?.[0]\) console.log\(''stats[0] keys:'', Object.keys\(h.stats[0]\)\); if\(h.stats?.[0]?.splits?.[0]\) { const sp = h.stats[0].splits[0]; console.log\(''split keys:'', Object.keys\(sp\)\); console.log\(''player:'', sp.player?.fullName, ''team:'', sp.team?.name, ''stat:'', JSON.stringify\(sp.stat\).slice\(0,200\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const h=require\(''C:/Users/zohnw/AppData/Local/Temp/mlb_hitting.json''\); const sp=h.stats[0].splits; console.log\(''splits count:'', sp.length\); if\(sp[0]\) { console.log\(''split[0] keys:'', Object.keys\(sp[0]\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''player:'', sp[0].player?.fullName, ''| team:'', sp[0].team?.name\); console.log\(''stat:'', JSON.stringify\(sp[0].stat\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\(''C:/Users/zohnw/AppData/Local/Temp/mlb_sched.json''\); console.log\(''dates:'', s.dates?.length\); if\(s.dates?.[0]\) { const d=s.dates[0]; console.log\(''date:'', d.date, ''games:'', d.games?.length\); if\(d.games?.[0]\) { const g=d.games[0]; console.log\(''game keys:'', Object.keys\(g\).filter\(k=>[''gamePk'',''status'',''teams'',''gameDate'',''venue''].includes\(k\)\)\); console.log\(''status:'', JSON.stringify\(g.status\)\); console.log\(''teams.home:'', JSON.stringify\(g.teams?.home?.team\)\); console.log\(''score h/a:'', g.teams?.home?.score, g.teams?.away?.score\); } }")
